name: zen_bot
description: Zen Bot monorepo for Telegram and WhatsApp poet assistant

scripts.build: npm run --workspace @zen/channel-telegram build && npm run --workspace @zen/channel-whatsapp build && npm run --workspace @zen/retrieval build && npm run --workspace @zen/llm-adapter build && npm run --workspace @zen/evaluation build && npm run --workspace @zen/bot-api build
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace @zen/channel-telegram typecheck && npm run --workspace @zen/channel-whatsapp typecheck && npm run --workspace @zen/retrieval typecheck && npm run --workspace @zen/llm-adapter typecheck && npm run --workspace @zen/evaluation typecheck && npm run --workspace @zen/bot-api typecheck
